# Minion
> Secure BankID-powered delegation management platform for Swedish businesses.

## What is Minion?
Minion is a SaaS platform that enables Swedish individuals and organisations to create,
sign and manage legally-binding power of attorney documents (fullmakter) using Swedish
BankID. Both the grantor (the person granting authority) and the delegate (the person
receiving authority) sign the delegation document with their BankID, creating a
non-repudiable digital record verified in real time by any third party.

## Core Problem Solved
In Sweden, delegating authority to act on someone's behalf in business contexts —
signing contracts, accessing financial accounts, representing in HR matters — typically
requires paper-based power of attorney documents that are slow, difficult to verify,
and prone to fraud. Minion digitises this process entirely using legally-recognised
electronic signatures.

## Key Features
- BankID-signed delegation documents (legally binding, non-repudiable, court-admissible)
- QR code verification (third parties verify without a Minion account)
- Real-time status tracking (Pending/Active/Rejected/Revoked/Expired)
- Verify API (REST API for enterprise integrations, token/secret auth)
- Multi-language: Swedish, English, German, Turkish, Spanish, French
- GDPR compliant, EU data storage, 7-year legal archiving
- Credit-based consumption model

## Who Uses Minion?
Primary users: Swedish businesses needing to manage employee or agent delegations —
banks, insurance companies, law firms, real estate agencies, healthcare providers.
Secondary users: Third-party companies that verify delegations via API — any
organisation that receives customers acting under power of attorney.

## Technology Stack
- Backend: ASP.NET Core 8, PostgreSQL, Azure, BankID REST API v6.0
- Mobile: Flutter (iOS + Android + Web)
- Web: Next.js 14 marketing site
- Authentication: Swedish BankID (8.5M+ users in Sweden)
- E-signing: BankID Sign (legally equivalent to handwritten signature per Swedish law and eIDAS)
- Storage: Azure Blob (encrypted), Azure Sweden Central region

## Pricing
App credits: 99–1,299 SEK per bundle (1 credit = 1 delegation document).
Verify API: Free tier (50 req/month) up to 6,990 SEK/month (10,000 req/month).
Enterprise: custom pricing.

## Legal & Compliance
GDPR compliant. Data stored in EU (Azure Sweden Central). Personal numbers encrypted
at rest (AES-256). TLS 1.3 in transit. Documents archived 7 years per Swedish law.
Governing law: Swedish law. DPO contact: privacy@minion.se.

## Contact
Website: https://minion.se | Email: hello@minion.se | Location: Stockholm, Sweden
